data.title: JPMorgan slashes stablecoin forecast to $500B by 2028
data.description:
JPMorgan forecasts the stablecoin market will reach $500 billion by 2028, far less than Standard Chartered’s $2 trillion projection.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/jpmorgan-cuts-stablecoin-forecast-to-500b/

data.title: Solana treasury firm extends stock rally after buying $2.7M of SOL
data.description:
The company’s Solana stack is now worth almost $98 million. The firm’s stock price is up 2,733% year-to-date.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/solana-treasury-firm-extends-rally-after-buying-sol?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss%3Fnc%3D1751609044292%26_q%3D1751609044292%26timestamp%3D1751609044292&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Binance Alpha will launch CROSS, with a threshold of 140 points for airdrops
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Binance Alpha will launch CROSS (CROSS), and trading will start at 16:00 (UTC+8) on July 4, 2025.
Eligible users can use Binance Alpha points to claim 500 CROSS tokens on the event page within 24 hours after trading starts. Users with at least 140 Binance Alpha points can participate in the airdrop on a first-come, first-served basis until the airdrop pool is fully distributed or the airdrop event ends.

data.title: Bitget Onchain launches W, M, and economy tokens
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) has launched Solana and BNB Smart Chain's MEME tokens W, M, and economy. Users can start trading in the on-chain trading section.
Bitget Onchain aims to seamlessly connect CEX and DEX to provide users with a more convenient, efficient, and secure on-chain trading experience. Users can directly use Bitget spot accounts (USDT/USDC) to trade popular assets on the chain. Currently, popular public chains such as Solana (SOL), BNB Smart Chain (BSC) and Base are supported.

data.title: Bitget Wallet natively connects to Katana mainnet, supporting users to participate in 1 billion KAT mining incentive plan
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Web3 wallet Bitget Wallet has been connected to the Katana mainnet built for DeFi scenarios. Users can add the Katana mainnet through Bitget Wallet to perform basic operations such as transfer and receipt, and connect to Katana DApp to interact and earn KAT income.
Katana is a Layer2 network jointly incubated by Polygon and GSR. It is designed for efficient asset matching and composable DeFi modules, aiming to bring users a better on-chain transaction and lending experience. Currently, Katana has officially launched a native token incentive plan with a total of 1 billion KAT to encourage users to participate in early liquidity mining.

data.title: Bitcoin's early whale transferred 10,000 BTC after 14 years of silence
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, an old Bitcoin wallet that has been silent for more than 14 years has just transferred out 10,000 BTC, which is about 1.09 billion US dollars at the current price. The wallet initially purchased Bitcoin at a price of only 0.78 US dollars. This transfer is equivalent to a return of about 140,000 times.

data.title: US Republicans declare ‘Crypto Week’ to mull 3 crypto bills
data.description:

data.title: Trump plans to impose tariffs of up to 70% on some countries, effective August 1
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the latest public statement, US President Trump plans to impose tariffs of varying proportions on different countries, ranging from 10%-20% to 60%-70%. Countries will start paying these tariffs from August 1, 2025. This move is expected to have an impact on the global trade structure and related markets. (Jinshi)

data.title: The top three currencies in Gate Alpha’s trading volume yesterday: BR, ICNT, TSLAX
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official data, the top three currencies in terms of daily trading volume on Gate Alpha on July 3 were: BR, ICNT, and TSLAX.
Alpha has listed KIRBY (KIRBY), Nia (Nia), Uranus (URANUS), and Don't Burn Capital (DBC) today. The xStocks section also listed Nasdaq xStock (QQQx) and other tokens. You can trade by entering the APP. The third Gate Alpha Points Festival has been opened. Participants in the transaction can share the million-dollar prize pool, and you can receive a $100 reward for completing the designated tasks.
Gate Alpha now supports popular public chains such as SOL, ETH, BNB Chain, and Base. Users can use USDT in the spot account to directly purchase popular assets on the chain without manually changing chains, recharging or authorizing.

data.title: Paper gold, paper bitcoin: Is there an issue with ETFs?
data.description:
Is Bitcoin becoming paper gold? Rising ETF exposure fuels concerns over custody, transparency, and proof of reserves. The article Paper gold, paper bitcoin: Is there an issue with ETFs? was first published on Crypto Valley Journal.
source: https://cryptovalleyjournal.com/focus/background/paper-gold-paper-bitcoin-is-there-an-issue-with-etfs/?utm_campaign=rss_reader&utm_medium=rss&utm_source=feed_source&utm_content=Paper+gold%2C+paper+bitcoin%3A+Is+there+an+issue+with+ETFs%3F

data.title: Amber International raises $25.5 million to fuel $100 million crypto reserve strategy
data.description:
The Nasdaq-listed firm said it plans to use the proceeds to support its $100 million crypto reserve strategy launched earlier this year.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/361046/amber-international-26-million-raise-crypto-reserve?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Amber International Completes $25.5 Million Private Funding to Advance $100 Million Crypto Reserve Strategy
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Amber International, a listed subsidiary of Amber Group, announced the completion of a $25.5 million private placement financing, with investors including Pantera Capital, CMAG Funds and other institutions. The funds will be used to support its $100 million crypto reserve strategy launched in May, aimed at promoting the long-term development of the ecosystem and product innovation. Currently, its reserve assets have covered BTC, ETH, SOL, BNB, XRP and SUI, focusing on the layout of RWA asset tokenization and AgentFi. (The Block)

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs had a total net inflow of $602 million yesterday, with Fidelity ETF FBTC leading the way with a net inflow of $237 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (July 3, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$602 million.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Fidelity ETF FBTC, with a single-day net inflow of US$237 million. Currently, FBTC's total net inflow has reached US$12.209 billion.
The second is Blackrock ETF IBIT, with a single-day net inflow of US$225 million. Currently, IBIT's total net inflow has reached US$52.646 billion.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is US$137.597 billion, and the ETF net asset ratio (market value to total Bitcoin market value) is 6.29%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$49.642 billion.
